text: I stand in a corridor outside a sleek glass meeting room, struck by the contrast between the utilitarian fixtures and the quiet orderliness that pervades the space. In the next room, vibrant colors and bold letters proclaim "R+D," inviting me to contemplate the marriage of innovation and design. Surrounded by words and technology, I feel an energizing sense of curiosity. The world here seems shaped by minds eager to build, connect, and explore. I feel like a guest at a temple of ideas—both apart from and a part of its unfolding story.
